from typing import Any


def process_data(payload: Any) -> Any:
    return transform(payload)


def transform(item: Any) -> Any:
    if isinstance(item, dict):
        return {k: transform(v) for k, v in item.items()}
    if isinstance(item, list):
        return [transform(v) for v in item]
    return item


def fetch_record(record_id: str) -> Any:
    return {"id": record_id, "data": "placeholder"}


def merge_configs(base: Any, override: Any) -> Any:
    if isinstance(base, dict) and isinstance(override, dict):
        result = dict(base)
        result.update(override)
        return result
    return override
